phase_history.note: Release artifacts ready. CHANGELOG.md v0.10.0 prepended, pyproject.toml bumped to 0.10.0, 609/609 tests green, ruff clean, openspec archived (specs: conditional-cache created, github-collector+scheduler-cli updated), commit f1a8163 pushed to feature/V2-006-discussions.

active_concerns: RISK-001 (MEDIUM): commit() placement in run_pipeline — after _collect_all returns, unguarded; pipeline test asserts once-after-loop AND not-called-on-mid-loop-AuthError
etag_store.py must INVERT json_store.py: best-effort empty+WARN, never StateError-fatal
first-page-only 304=empty-delta depends on newest-first; do not send If-None-Match on pages 2..N
token discipline: etags.json = keys+validators only; conditional-path errors never str(exc); secret-scan in task 6.4

terminology.ETag / conditional request: opaque HTTP validator echoed in If-None-Match; 304 Not Modified = unchanged and does NOT count against rate limit
terminology.Empty delta (304): first-page 304 → return [] for that endpoint, no further pages (sound because newest-first)
terminology.ConditionalCache port: get(key)->str|None, set(key,validator) in-memory, commit() durable best-effort; key='{repo}:{endpoint}'
terminology.JsonFileETagStore: adapter → separate etags.json, atomic temp+rename, best-effort corrupt-tolerant (opposite of state.json)
terminology.Commit ordering: set() in-memory during fetch; pipeline commit() once after mark_seen — crash-safety against lost items
terminology.Two-flag gate: conditional requests active only when etag_cache_enabled AND delta_enabled
